import { ParsedLocation, ScrollRestorationEntry, ScrollRestorationOptions } from '@tanstack/router-core'; /** * @deprecated Use the `scrollRestoration` router option instead. */ export declare function ScrollRestoration(_props: ScrollRestorationOptions): null; export declare function useElementScrollRestoration(options: ({ id: string; getElement?: () => Window | Element | undefined | null; } | { id?: string; getElement: () => Window | Element | undefined | null; }) & { getKey?: (location: ParsedLocation) => string; }): ScrollRestorationEntry | undefined;
